PROFILE: daily

IIIIIIII translate google instances

IIIIIIII others

IIIIIIII firefox

IIIIIIII bookmarklet

IIIIIIII ### 🔍 searx enable all search engines
IIIIIIII ### 🔍 highlight text
IIIIIIII ### 🔍 highlight text by regex
IIIIIIII ### H1 H2 show title list
IIIIIIII ### 🎨🖌 set background grey
IIIIIIII ### 📷 screenshot
IIIIIIII ### 🔗 URL print query params to console
IIIIIIII ### 🔠✓✓ fill forms
IIIIIIII ### 🧹 clear console history
IIIIIIII ### CSS🧹 remove all css except inline
IIIIIIII ### $ inject jquery
IIIIIIII ### ⊞ wrap with border each html element
IIIIIIII ### 1 2 3 add numbers on each item ("li" element)
IIIIIIII ### TABLE⊞ x wikipedi remove any row or column
IIIIIIII ### TABLE⊞ 1 2 3 show numbers on each row
IIIIIIII ### TABLE⊞ = | replace columns with rows
IIIIIIII ### TABLE⊞ a➜b➜c sortable
